statements.note: Core transformation logic — all non-identity columns populated

writer_analysis.logic_summary: Full reload via TRUNCATE + INSERT. Joins requisition headers and lines from PTP_System, resolves surrogate keys against DW dimensions (date, employee x2, product, vendor) with ISNULL defaults. Derives status flags and approval duration from RequisitionStatus and date fields.

classification.rationale: The proc performs a full TRUNCATE + INSERT with grain of one row per requisition line event; measures (Quantity, Estimated_Unit_Price, Approval_Duration_Days) and status flags are attributes of a procurement transaction event, and the column shape of multiple _sk FK columns plus numeric measures confirms fact_transaction rather than periodic_snapshot.

primary_key.rationale: Catalog declares PK_Fact_Requisition on Fact_Requisition_SK, and auto_increment_columns confirms it is an IDENTITY column — definitively surrogate.

foreign_keys.rationale: Two distinct fact columns (Requestor_Employee_SK and Approver_Employee_SK) both FK to Dim_Employee.Employee_SK, satisfying the role_playing rule.
Two distinct fact columns (Requestor_Employee_SK and Approver_Employee_SK) both FK to Dim_Employee.Employee_SK, satisfying the role_playing rule.
Single fact column joining one dimension with no multi-role pattern.
Two distinct fact columns (RequisitionDate_SK and RequiredByDate_SK) both FK to Dim_Date.Date_SK, satisfying the role_playing rule.
Two distinct fact columns (RequisitionDate_SK and RequiredByDate_SK) both FK to Dim_Date.Date_SK, satisfying the role_playing rule.
Single fact column joining one dimension with no multi-role pattern.

natural_key.rationale: The proc inserts Requisition_BK (RequisitionNumber, VARCHAR(20)) and RequisitionLine_BK (RequisitionLineID, INT) as the business grain — one row per requisition line uniquely identified by these two columns.

watermark.rationale: The proc performs a full TRUNCATE + INSERT with no incremental WHERE filter; DW_Load_DateTime (DATETIME2) is the ETL batch load timestamp and the recommended dbt materialization is table (full refresh) rather than incremental.

refactor.extracted_sql: SELECT r.RequisitionNumber AS Requisition_BK, rl.RequisitionLineID AS RequisitionLine_BK, -- Date dimension lookups using YYYYMMDD integer key ISNULL(d_req.Date_SK, 0) AS RequisitionDate_SK, ISNULL(d_rby.Date_SK, 0) AS RequiredByDate_SK, -- Employee lookups (join source -> current DW dimension row) ISNULL(emp_req.Employee_SK, -1) AS Requestor_Employee_SK, ISNULL(emp_apr.Employee_SK, -1) AS Approver_Employee_SK, ISNULL(prod.Product_SK, -1) AS Product_SK, ISNULL(svnd.Vendor_SK, -1) AS SuggestedVendor_SK, -- Status flags r.RequisitionStatus AS Requisition_Status, CASE WHEN r.RequisitionStatus IN ('Approved','Converted') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS Is_Approved, CASE WHEN r.RequisitionStatus = 'Rejected' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS Is_Rejected, CASE WHEN r.RequisitionStatus = 'Converted' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS Is_Converted_To_PO, -- Measures rl.Quantity AS Quantity_Requested, rl.EstimatedUnitPrice AS Estimated_Unit_Price, CAST(rl.Quantity * rl.EstimatedUnitPrice AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS Estimated_Line_Total, -- Approval duration: days from submission to actioning CASE WHEN r.RequisitionStatus IN ('Approved','Rejected','Converted') THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, r.RequisitionDate, CAST(r.UpdatedAt AS DATE)) ELSE NULL END AS Approval_Duration_Days FROM PTP_System.Purchasing.Requisitions r INNER JOIN PTP_System.Purchasing.RequisitionLines rl ON rl.RequisitionID = r.RequisitionID -- Source-side employee and item joins INNER JOIN PTP_System.Master.Employees src_req_emp ON src_req_emp.EmployeeID = r.RequestedByID INNER JOIN PTP_System.Master.Items src_itm ON src_itm.ItemID = rl.ItemID -- Date dimension LEFT JOIN dbo.Dim_Date d_req ON d_req.Date_SK = CAST(FORMAT(r.RequisitionDate, 'yyyyMMdd') AS INT) LEFT JOIN dbo.Dim_Date d_rby ON d_rby.Date_SK = CAST(FORMAT(r.RequiredByDate, 'yyyyMMdd') AS INT) -- Employee dimension (current version) LEFT JOIN dbo.Dim_Employee emp_req ON emp_req.Employee_BK = src_req_emp.EmployeeCode AND emp_req.IsCurrent = 1 LEFT JOIN PTP_System.Master.Employees src_apr_emp ON src_apr_emp.EmployeeID = r.ApprovedByID LEFT JOIN dbo.Dim_Employee emp_apr ON emp_apr.Employee_BK = src_apr_emp.EmployeeCode AND emp_apr.IsCurrent = 1 -- Product dimension (current version) LEFT JOIN dbo.Dim_Product prod ON prod.Product_BK = src_itm.ItemCode AND prod.IsCurrent = 1 -- Suggested vendor dimension (current version) LEFT JOIN PTP_System.Master.Vendors src_svnd ON src_svnd.VendorID = rl.SuggestedVendorID LEFT JOIN dbo.Dim_Vendor svnd ON svnd.Vendor_BK = src_svnd.VendorCode AND svnd.IsCurrent = 1
refactor.refactored_sql: WITH source_requisitions AS ( SELECT * FROM PTP_System.Purchasing.Requisitions ), source_requisition_lines AS ( SELECT * FROM PTP_System.Purchasing.RequisitionLines ), source_requestor_employees AS ( SELECT * FROM PTP_System.Master.Employees ), source_approver_employees AS ( SELECT * FROM PTP_System.Master.Employees ), source_items AS ( SELECT * FROM PTP_System.Master.Items ), source_vendors AS ( SELECT * FROM PTP_System.Master.Vendors ), dim_date AS ( SELECT * FROM dbo.Dim_Date ), dim_employee AS ( SELECT * FROM dbo.Dim_Employee ), dim_product AS ( SELECT * FROM dbo.Dim_Product ), dim_vendor AS ( SELECT * FROM dbo.Dim_Vendor ), joined AS ( SELECT r.RequisitionNumber, rl.RequisitionLineID, r.RequisitionStatus, r.RequisitionDate, r.RequiredByDate, r.UpdatedAt, rl.Quantity, rl.EstimatedUnitPrice, rl.SuggestedVendorID, src_req_emp.EmployeeCode AS Requestor_EmployeeCode, src_apr_emp.EmployeeCode AS Approver_EmployeeCode, src_itm.ItemCode, src_svnd.VendorCode AS SuggestedVendorCode FROM source_requisitions r INNER JOIN source_requisition_lines rl ON rl.RequisitionID = r.RequisitionID INNER JOIN source_requestor_employees src_req_emp ON src_req_emp.EmployeeID = r.RequestedByID INNER JOIN source_items src_itm ON src_itm.ItemID = rl.ItemID LEFT JOIN source_approver_employees src_apr_emp ON src_apr_emp.EmployeeID = r.ApprovedByID LEFT JOIN source_vendors src_svnd ON src_svnd.VendorID = rl.SuggestedVendorID ), with_lookups AS ( SELECT j.RequisitionNumber, j.RequisitionLineID, j.RequisitionStatus, j.RequisitionDate, j.RequiredByDate, j.UpdatedAt, j.Quantity, j.EstimatedUnitPrice, d_req.Date_SK AS RequisitionDate_SK, d_rby.Date_SK AS RequiredByDate_SK, emp_req.Employee_SK AS Requestor_Employee_SK, emp_apr.Employee_SK AS Approver_Employee_SK, prod.Product_SK, svnd.Vendor_SK AS SuggestedVendor_SK FROM joined j LEFT JOIN dim_date d_req ON d_req.Date_SK = CAST(FORMAT(j.RequisitionDate, 'yyyyMMdd') AS INT) LEFT JOIN dim_date d_rby ON d_rby.Date_SK = CAST(FORMAT(j.RequiredByDate, 'yyyyMMdd') AS INT) LEFT JOIN dim_employee emp_req ON emp_req.Employee_BK = j.Requestor_EmployeeCode AND emp_req.IsCurrent = 1 LEFT JOIN dim_employee emp_apr ON emp_apr.Employee_BK = j.Approver_EmployeeCode AND emp_apr.IsCurrent = 1 LEFT JOIN dim_product prod ON prod.Product_BK = j.ItemCode AND prod.IsCurrent = 1 LEFT JOIN dim_vendor svnd ON svnd.Vendor_BK = j.SuggestedVendorCode AND svnd.IsCurrent = 1 ), final AS ( SELECT RequisitionNumber AS Requisition_BK, RequisitionLineID AS RequisitionLine_BK, ISNULL(RequisitionDate_SK, 0) AS RequisitionDate_SK, ISNULL(RequiredByDate_SK, 0) AS RequiredByDate_SK, ISNULL(Requestor_Employee_SK, -1) AS Requestor_Employee_SK, ISNULL(Approver_Employee_SK, -1) AS Approver_Employee_SK, ISNULL(Product_SK, -1) AS Product_SK, ISNULL(SuggestedVendor_SK, -1) AS SuggestedVendor_SK, RequisitionStatus AS Requisition_Status, CASE WHEN RequisitionStatus IN ('Approved','Converted') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS Is_Approved, CASE WHEN RequisitionStatus = 'Rejected' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS Is_Rejected, CASE WHEN RequisitionStatus = 'Converted' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS Is_Converted_To_PO, Quantity AS Quantity_Requested, EstimatedUnitPrice AS Estimated_Unit_Price, CAST(Quantity * EstimatedUnitPrice AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS Estimated_Line_Total, CASE WHEN RequisitionStatus IN ('Approved','Rejected','Converted') THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, RequisitionDate, CAST(UpdatedAt AS DATE)) ELSE NULL END AS Approval_Duration_Days FROM with_lookups ) SELECT * FROM final
